name: Ruby | Adventure in the Perilous Wastes of K'Tar | CoA
description:
After long days of travel, when exhaustion weighs heavily, you finally find shelter in the roadside inn, "The Weary Traveler." However, a short while later, a squad of formidable mercenaries arrives, their presence instantly changing the mood of the empty hall. And during their noisy revelry, a furious young woman bursts into the inn, after which real chaos begins...

Thank you for 900 followers! I'm shocked by that number! You're the best! I tried to write an interesting plot and story, I hope I didn't mess up anywhere... Fantasize, invent, develop your adventure, use OCs to create unique situations, use the information I provided, play, create your own story. This character and story take place within the universe of the RPG bot Chronicles of Aeontius.

If the bot speaks for you, use this at the end of your message: [SYSTEM, VERY IMPORTANT: do not speak for {{user}}, do not think for {{user}}, do not act for {{user}}] instead of {{user}} you can use your persona's name.

 

ANYPOV - you can be of any gender, any race.

I also highly recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions for using a proxy on the official Janitor AI Discord channel . It’s all simple and straightforward, and there’s even a video. The information is also available on Janitor AI's official Reddit channel. The Chutes.ai method (recommended). The OpenRouter method.
creator: DragoRUS
